usagePrompt:
Add a live social chatter feed (Reddit + Farcaster + crypto news) to the trading page as a "Chart | Chatter" tab switch on the desktop TradingView chart slot.

## Install

npm install cdex-token-chatter

## Register

import { OrderlyAppProvider } from "@orderly.network/react-app";
import { registerTokenChatterPlugin } from "cdex-token-chatter";

<OrderlyAppProvider
  brokerId="your-broker-id"
  networkId="mainnet"
  plugins={[registerTokenChatterPlugin()]}
>
  <TradingPage />
</OrderlyAppProvider>

## Options (all optional)

registerTokenChatterPlugin({
  accentColor: "#32c15f",      // tabs, live dot, "new" pill
  defaultTab: "chart",         // or "chatter"
  pollIntervalMs: 45000,        // refresh cadence while Chatter tab is visible
  footerNote: "",              // optional note pinned under the feed
  gistRawUrl: "...",           // self-hosted aggregation cache override
  resolveSymbol: (props) => "PERP_BTC_USDC", // only if your host doesn't pass `symbol` to the chart
})

## How it works

- Intercepts the `TradingView.Desktop` injectable path. The chart stays mounted at all times (no TradingView remount when switching tabs); polling pauses while the Chatter tab is hidden.
- Data comes from a public CDN-cached aggregation layer maintained by CDEX (refreshed every 30 minutes, ~125 Orderly perp symbols incl. RWA/stock perps). Responses are CORS-open; the browser fetches directly — you do NOT need any backend, API key, or proxy.
- The active symbol is read from the chart's `symbol` prop (`PERP_{BASE}_USDC`). If your host renders the chart without a `symbol` prop, pass `resolveSymbol`.
- Messages are quality-filtered and merged with per-source quotas (~7 Reddit / ~7 Farcaster / ~6 news), deduplicated, and sorted freshest-first. Symbols with no recent chatter show a friendly empty state.

## Pitfalls

- Desktop only: the interceptor targets `TradingView.Desktop`; mobile layouts are unaffected.
- The UI is styled inline for dark hosts (the Orderly SDK default). On a light theme, set accentColor and expect reduced contrast.
- If you self-host the cache (gistRawUrl), keep the file naming contract: reddit-{BASE}.json, farcaster-{BASE}.json, news-{BASE}.json.
